The '''''Metron Burner''''' was a [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]] [[YT-1300 light freighter/Legends|YT-1300 light freighter]] [[Transport/Legends|transport]] owned by [[Bama Vook]] prior to the [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|Invasion of Naboo]]

{{Ship-stub}}

*''[[Episode I Adventures 2: The Bartokk Assassins]]'' {{1st}}

*''[[Episode I Adventures 4: Jedi Emergency]]''
